slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — file-matching slug (matches filename in companies/).

last_verified.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — ISO date of last human review. Drives 18-month staleness gate.

reviewer.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Lineage — human/agent that signed off on the entry.

data_quality_grade.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — curator-assigned entry-level grade (Q1/Q2/Q3). Orthogonal to citation tier.

tier.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Lineage — strongest tier among this entry's citations.

source_url.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Lineage — URL of the strongest-tier citation.

anchor.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Lineage — optional section anchor within the primary source.

primary_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Lineage — strongest-tier citation pointer (convenience; not enforcement).

metric.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Scale — which scale metric is reported.

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Scale — point estimate or [low, high] range.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — slug of the Atlas entry that owns this citation (e.g., "anthropic", "shopify").

source_url.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — canonical source URL. HTTPS only; must resolve under the ingest domain allowlist (enforced at fetch time).

source_tier.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — tier per SOURCES.md taxonomy.

publish_date.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — publication date of the cited source (not fetch date). Drives staleness gate.

retrieved_at.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance-hash — ISO-8601 timestamp of the fetch that produced sha256.

sha256.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance-hash — SHA-256 (hex) of the fetched source body. Re-compute on refetch; mismatch flags the entry for review.

bytes_integrity.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance-hash — tag describing what `sha256` actually hashes. `clean` = sha matches article bytes. `captcha_wall` / `paywall` / `cdn_geoblock` = sha covers a wall, content retrieved via WebFetch. `webfetch_only_no_raw_html` = SPA shell / JS-rendered page where raw HTML carries no article body (e.g., stripe.com/blog SPA); content extracted via WebFetch only. When ≠ `clean`, `content_sha256` is REQUIRED.

content_sha256.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance-hash — SHA-256 of extracted MD body. Stable across captcha/paywall variants. REQUIRED when `bytes_integrity` ≠ `clean`; when `bytes_integrity` = `clean`, optional.

is_ic.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — TRUE iff the speaker/author is an individual contributor (not exec, VP, marketing, or vendor partner). REQUIRED true for E_conference to qualify as a prior source per plan §6.3 ("E is B-equivalent only when speaker is IC"). Default undefined; refinement treats undefined as false for tier E.

anchor.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — optional heading/section anchor within the source (e.g., "§6.1 Availability").

corroborated_by.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — secondary citations. For NON-PRIOR quant claims only (e.g., revenue on AI-private where dual-C is permitted per plan §6.3). Does NOT rescue tier C/D for math priors — priors still require B/E/G per `citationIsPriorAcceptable`.

citation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Sources — provenance record. Every numeric prior carries one.

revenue_usd_annual.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Economics — annual revenue USD; null when undisclosed.

infra_cost_usd_annual.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Economics — annual infra cost USD; null when undisclosed.

headcount_est.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Economics — estimated FTE headcount; null when undisclosed.

economics_citations.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > Economics — backing citations for revenue/cost/headcount claims.

ai_stack.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > AI Stack — REQUIRED for kind ∈ {ai_infra_public, frontier_ai_private}.

gpu_exposure.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > AI Stack — GPU ownership pattern (default none).

inference_pattern.description: x-ui-surface=section:Entry > AI Stack — inference deployment pattern (default none).

units.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — rate unit. Request-rate (rps/rpm/rph/qps), data-rate (bytes_per_second .. pb_per_day), or message/event-rate (messages_per_second, events_per_second). Choose the unit that keeps `value` in a human-reasonable range.

measurement.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — what this rate represents (peak burst, sustained average, or tail window).

window.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — optional window label (e.g., "1s", "5m", "BFCM 2025").

concurrency.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — typical concurrent clients/connections producing this rate.

replicas.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — backend fleet size at the time of measurement.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — scalar throughput observation (peak/sustained/tail).

throughput_priors.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Throughput — scalar throughput priors (rps/rpm/rph/qps; peak/sustained/tail).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Cost — piecewise cost curve.

cost_curves.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Cost — piecewise cost curves.

utility_weight_hints.description: x-ui-surface=section:Math Priors > Utility Weights — REQUIRED for AI-kind entries.

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — typed pointer from a mathDerivation into KB-8 priors.

related_refs.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — optional cross-entry prior refs (sibling companies, archetypes).

nda_clean.description: x-ui-surface=internal:ingest-gate — NDA screen MUST pass before commit. Hard-literal true.

ingest_script_version.description: x-ui-surface=internal:ingest-gate — version of scripts/atlas/structure-to-entry.ts that produced the entry.
